{"id":"project-LICHEN-ra3n","title":"loadng.c: Route cache expiry comparison not wraparound-safe","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/routing/loadng.c
Lines: 244, 328-330

In lichen_loadng_cache_lookup() line 244:
    if (now_ms != 0 && found->valid_until_ms <= now_ms) {

In lichen_loadng_cache_expire() lines 328-330:
    if (route_cache[i].active &&
        route_cache[i].valid_until_ms <= now_ms) {

These comparisons are NOT wraparound-safe. After ~49 days of uptime:
- valid_until_ms could be 0xFFFFFF00 (near wrap)
- now_ms could be 0x00000100 (after wrap)
- The comparison 0xFFFFFF00 <= 0x100 is FALSE, keeping expired routes active

The correct approach uses signed comparison:
    (int32_t)(valid_until_ms - now_ms) <= 0

Other parts of the codebase handle this correctly (gradient.c lines 129, 151, 228).","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:50:25.132669Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:50:25.132694Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-ra3n","title":"loadng.c: Route cache expiry comparison not wraparound-safe","description":"File: lichen/subsys/lichen/routing/loadng.c
Lines: 244, 328-330

In lichen_loadng_cache_lookup() line 244:
    if (now_ms != 0 && found->valid_until_ms <= now_ms) {

In lichen_loadng_cache_expire() lines 328-330:
    if (route_cache[i].active &&
        route_cache[i].valid_until_ms <= now_ms) {

These comparisons are NOT wraparound-safe. After ~49 days of uptime:
- valid_until_ms could be 0xFFFFFF00 (near wrap)
- now_ms could be 0x00000100 (after wrap)
- The comparison 0xFFFFFF00 <= 0x100 is FALSE, keeping expired routes active

The correct approach uses signed comparison:
    (int32_t)(valid_until_ms - now_ms) <= 0

Other parts of the codebase handle this correctly (gradient.c lines 129, 151, 228).","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:50:25.132669Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T20:13:52.158920522Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T20:13:52.158920522Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T20:18:52.158920522Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T20:13:52.158920522Z"}
